sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93436" key="*saturo/fhr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Σᾰτῠρόφηρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ηρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n93436.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wild creature like a Satyr</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.48</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
